hooks.template: This is why doing (insert action) makes you (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This is why fighting your supplier on price loses a business owner four percent a year.

hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result).
hooks.text: Here is exactly how much a business owner loses to bank FX on half a million in sourcing.

hooks.template: After X years of (insert action) I realized one thing: (insert statement).
hooks.text: After a full year of supplier payments, one business owner saw it: four percent just gone.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: A business owner kept twenty thousand dollars a year without changing one supplier.

hooks.template: So okay, being an (insert target audience), my days vary quite a lot from one another.
hooks.text: So okay, a business owner sourcing from China loses four percent every single payment, quietly.
